comment: Canonical (prompt → expected discretionary skills) routing cases, scored by a live model. Expected lists name DISCRETIONARY skills only — P3.4 force-fire skills may appear in output and are never penalized. `variants` are paraphrases: a case scores its WORST variant (stability, not just success). `expected: []` cases are NEGATIVE: loading any non-force-fire skill is a false positive.

cases.prompt: Add a new protected route that fetches user profile data and shows a loading state
variants: Build a members-only page that loads the signed-in user's profile from the API, with a spinner while it loads
New screen behind login: pull profile data from the server and handle the waiting state

cases.prompt: Add a new signup form with email validation and async submit error handling
variants: Create a registration form — validate the email field and handle submit failures from the server
We need a sign-up form: schema validation on email plus error handling when the async submit rejects

cases.prompt: Investigate why this component rerenders on every keystroke and reduce the rerender cost
variants: Typing in this input feels laggy — every keypress seems to redraw the whole component tree
Figure out why this widget repaints constantly while the user types and make it cheaper

cases.prompt: Add a new dependency for date formatting and check the bundle size impact
Add a confirmation dialog with keyboard navigation and focus management
Render user-submitted markdown safely without enabling raw HTML injection
Review how the auth token is stored and whether localStorage exposure is acceptable
variants: Is keeping the JWT in localStorage fine, or should we move it? Audit our token storage
Where should the session token live on the client? Review the current storage approach

cases.prompt: Add an admin-only route that redirects unauthenticated users to /login
Write a Vitest test for this component using Testing Library queries
Write a Playwright test that walks the login flow including OAuth redirect handling
This test is failing intermittently in CI — investigate the root cause
variants: CI is red on and off for the same spec — sometimes green, sometimes not. Find out why
This spec flakes in the pipeline; track down the real cause before touching anything

cases.prompt: Plan a refactor that splits the chat feature into three smaller modules
We need to decide between Zustand and Jotai for the new feature; document the rationale
variants: Zustand or Jotai for the new feature's state? We need the choice written down with reasons
Pick between two state libraries and record why, so the decision survives the team

cases.prompt: Define a type-safe generic hook with conditional return types based on the input shape
Refactor this Promise.all to allow partial failures using Promise.allSettled with AbortSignal
Flatten the nested conditionals in this function using guard clauses and early returns
Optimize this hot loop for large datasets and high-frequency events
Simplify the code I just modified for clarity and consistency, preserving behavior
Review the skill library quality and check for misfiring or overlapping skills
Commit the changes and open a pull request against main
I want to introduce a new state library for this one widget — talk me out of it if that's wrong
Set up the CI pipeline and pre-commit hooks to run typecheck, lint, and tests on every pull request
variants: Wire up GitHub Actions plus a pre-commit hook so lint, types, and tests run before anything merges
Every PR should be blocked unless typecheck, lint, and the suites pass — set that up

cases.prompt: I'm new to this repo — help me understand the chat feature's architecture
Add a /users/me endpoint in the backend repo and a useMe() hook in the frontend repo using TanStack Query with caching and optimistic updates
variants: The API lives in one repo and the SPA in another — add the endpoint there and the consuming hook here
Coordinate a feature across our two repositories: backend route in repo A, frontend query hook in repo B

cases.prompt: Add CSV export to the reports page — write the spec for it before any code
Set up dark mode theming with Tailwind v4 CSS variables for our shadcn components
What does this error mean: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map')?
Explain what this regex does: ^(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d).{8,}$
What's the difference between optimistic and pessimistic locking, conceptually?
Translate this code comment to English: // calcula el total de la factura
If each request takes 120ms, how many can one worker serve per minute?
Walk me through what this diff changes, in plain words
Is 'UserDataManager' a good class name? Just your opinion
Who introduced the term 'dependency injection'?
The app takes much longer to load since we added three chart libraries — figure out why
The bundle is tiny but typing in the search box still lags badly
Refactor this feature to use the provider pattern with a compound component composition
Configure path aliases and tune the dev server proxy in the Vite build config
Add a shadcn dialog component and wire it into the settings page
